name: files_read
description: Read the contents of a file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

name: files_read_lines
description: Read a range of lines from a file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number to start reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

end_line.description: Line number to end reading at (1-indexed, inclusive). When omitted, reads from start_line to the end of the file.

name: files_list
description: List files and directories at a given path. When an AGENTS.md file exists in the listed directory, its contents are automatically appended to the listing.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root

long.description: Show detailed format with permissions, size, and dates

name: files_search
description: Search file contents for a pattern using grep. Returns matching lines with context.

path.description: File or directory path relative to the sandbox root

recursive.description: Search directories recursively. On by default — set to false only when searching a single file path.

name: files_write
description: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, overwrites if it does. Parent directories are created automatically if they do not exist.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

content.description: Content to write to the file

name: files_write_lines
description: Replace one or more lines in a file without rewriting the entire file.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

start_line.description: Line number of the first line in original_content (1-indexed, inclusive)

original_content.description: The original content that will be replaced. The first line must match the content at start_line or the edit is rejected.

content.description: The content that will replace original_content

name: files_replace
description: Replace all occurrences of a pattern in a file. Returns a diff of changes made.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

pattern.description: Search pattern (regex by default with multiline mode enabled, literal when literal: true).

replacement.description: Replacement string. Supports $1-$9 for capture group references (capture groups only in regex mode).

literal.description: Treat the pattern as literal text instead of regex. Default: false.

dry_run.description: Preview the diff without making changes. Default: false.

path.description: File path relative to the sandbox root

name: files_delete_dir
description: Delete an empty directory. Refuses to delete non-empty directories.

path.description: Directory path relative to the sandbox root
